creator: alexander@wittig.name
text:
Hello

This update looks good to me. I guess you can submit it to the tree.

Thanks,
Alex


Am 23.01.2007 9:44 Uhr schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of mail/squirrelmail-change_ldappass-plugin,
>
> Please note that PR ports/108259 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108259
>
